desc: SUPERSEDED 2026-07-21: the proposed image reused ADT AIC input 360, but bounded M4 Pro measurement established the real DockChannel-UART interrupt at input 816. Do not build or boot this timing discriminator unchanged. Historical FIFO observations remain valid; next console work is an offline audit/adaptation of the direct apple,dockchannel-uart IRQ-816 driver and a J614s-correct DT (done/2026-07-21-asahi-dev-log-review.md).
author: claude
